title: cleisostoma tricornutum
intro: Cleisostoma tricornutum, also known as the three-horned Cleisostoma, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cleisostoma tricornutum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cleisostoma tricornutum are typically made by infusing the plant's roots or leaves in water, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a paste.
